channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: I'm looking forward to using the new Philips Hue smart light sports sync feature during the World Cup — as long as it doesn't signal goals too early
item.description: Signify is giving its Philips Hue smart lights a special Sports Live feature for the duration of the World Cup 2026.

item.title: À moins de 300 €, ce pack Marshall avec une enceinte Acton III et un casque Major V est la meilleure offre audio du jour
item.description: Avis aux fans de la marque Marshall. Son-Vidéo propose actuellement un pack à 290 euros au lieu de 448 euros, contenant une enceinte Marshall Acton III au design iconique, ainsi qu'un casque Major V très endurant.

item.title: What is the release date for The Testaments episode 8 on Hulu and Disney+?
item.description: Daisy is fighting for her life... and for her truth to stay concealed in Gilead. But when does The Testaments episode 8 drop on Hulu and Disney+?

item.title: J’ai visité les Larrabee Studios : là où Michael Jackson a enregistré Dangerous
item.description: Rares sont les studios d’enregistrement qui peuvent prétendre avoir façonné le son de plusieurs générations de musique populaire. Les Larrabee Studios font partie de cette poignée d'exceptions où sont passés les plus grands artistes. J'ai eu la chance de les visiter.

item.title: Netflix may have finally figured out games
item.description: This is The Stepback, a weekly newsletter breaking down one essential story from the tech world. For more on Netflix, follow Andrew Webster. The Stepback arrives in our subscribers' inboxes at 8AM ET. Opt in for The Stepback here. How it started Boggle has become a spectator sport in my household. Everyone crowds around the […]

item.title: I'm a running coach: this is my long run survival kit for all eventualities, from the best watches and vest to the ideal phone to carry
item.description: These are my 10 long-run essentials, from running watches and shoes to energy bars

item.title: Students receive $10,000 prizes from OpenAI for innovative use of artificial intelligence
item.description: The awards come as the first class to have ChatGPT access for all four years of college is about to graduate. When University of Pennsylvania student Crystal Yang was in high school, she and her friends were avid players of the trendy online game Wordle. One of Yang’s friends, however, is blind and was unable to join in.
